if (!j) return; if (!j.crewData) j.crewData = {}; if (!j.crewData.inventory) j.crewData.inventory = {items:[]}; if (!j.crewData.inventory.clientPrompts) j.crewData.inventory.clientPrompts = {}; j.crewData.inventory.clientPrompts[idx] = true; saveData('job', j.id, j); dvRenderInvCompletion(jobId); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // FORMS LIBRARY // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function dvOpenFormsLibrary(jobId) { dvCurrentJobId = jobId; dvShowScreen('dv-screen-forms'); dvRenderFormsLibrary(jobId); } var DV_FORMS_LIBRARY = [ { id: 'damage_waiver', label: 'Damage Waiver', icon: '🛡', sub: 'Client waives liability for specific pre-existing conditions', status: 'Placeholder — form coming soon', col: '#E44258' }, { id: 'long_walk', label: 'Long Walk / Long Carry Form', icon: '🚶', sub: 'Record excess distance from vehicle to property', status: 'Placeholder — form coming soon', col: '#FF9F1A' }, { id: 'specialist_items', label: 'Specialist Items Declaration', icon: '💎', sub: 'High value / antique / fragile item agreement', status: 'Placeholder — form coming soon', col: '#9B59B6' }, { id: 'third_party', label: 'Third Party Access Form', icon: '🔑', sub: 'Authorisation for crew to access property without client present', status: 'Placeholder — form coming soon', col: '#0073EA' }, { id: 'packing_exclusion', label: 'Packing Exclusion Notice', icon: '📦', sub: 'Items client is packing themselves — liability exclusion', status: 'Placeholder — form coming soon', col: '#00A86B' }, ]; function dvRenderFormsLibrary(jobId) { var j = jobs.filter(function(x){return x.id===jobId;})[0]; if (!j) return; var h = dvDarkHeader('Forms Library', j.client, 'dvShowScreen(\'dv-screen-job\');dvRenderJobDetail(\'' + jobId + '\')'); h += '
'; h += '
⚠ Forms are currently placeholders. Full digital form capture is coming — content for each form will be added shortly.

'; el('dv-forms-body').innerHTML = h; } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PROPERTY WALKAROUND // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function dvOpenWalkaround(jobId) { dvCurrentJobId = jobId; dvShowScreen('dv-screen-walkaround'); dvRenderWalkaround(jobId); } var DV_WALKAROUND_TYPES = [ {id:'wall_scratch', label:'Wall — Scratch / Scuff', icon:'🪟', col:'#FF9F1A'}, {id:'wall_hole', label:'Wall — Hole / Dent', icon:'🔲', col:'#E44258'}, {id:'floor_scratch', label:'Floor — Scratch / Gouge', icon:'🪵', col:'#FF9F1A'}, {id:'floor_stain', label:'Floor — Stain / Mark', icon:'💧', col:'#9B59B6'}, {id:'door_chip', label:'Door Frame — Chip / Crack',icon:'🚪', col:'#E44258'}, {id:'ceiling', label:'Ceiling — Mark / Damage', icon:'☁', col:'#7A849E'}, {id:'banister', label:'Banister / Rail — Damage', icon:'🪜', col:'#FF9F1A'}, {id:'skirting', label:'Skirting Board — Damage', icon:'📐', col:'#9B59B6'}, {id:'tile', label:'Tile — Crack / Chip', icon:'🔷', col:'#0073EA'}, {id:'window', label:'Window — Crack / Chip', icon:'🪟', col:'#E44258'}, {id:'other', label:'Other Property Damage', icon:'⚠', col:'#7A849E'}, ]; var _waJobId = null; var _waPhotos = {}; // {tempId: b64} var _waAiLoading = false; function dvRenderWalkaround(jobId) { var j = jobs.filter(function(x){return x.id===jobId;})[0]; if (!j) return; if (!j.crewData) j.crewData = {}; if (!j.crewData.walkaround) j.crewData.walkaround = {damages:[], completedAt:null}; var wa = j.crewData.walkaround; var done = !!wa.completedAt; var dmgs = wa.damages || []; _waJobId = jobId; var h = dvDarkHeader('Property Walkaround', j.client + ' — ' + (j.origin||'Property'), 'dvShowScreen(\'dv-screen-job\');dvRenderJobDetail(\'' + jobId + '\')'); h += '
'; if (done) { h += '
✓ Walkaround complete · ' + dvNiceDate(new Date(wa.completedAt)) + ' · ' + esc(wa.completedBy||'') + '
'; } else { h += '
Walk around the property and record any pre-existing damage before work begins. Tap + Add Damage for each item found.
'; } // Damage list if (dmgs.length) { h += '
' + dmgs.length + ' damage' + (dmgs.length===1?'':'s') + ' recorded
'; dmgs.forEach(function(dmg, di) { var typeObj = DV_WALKAROUND_TYPES.filter(function(t){return t.id===dmg.type;})[0] || {icon:'⚠',col:'#7A849E',label:dmg.type}; h += '
'; h += '
'; h += '' + typeObj.icon + ''; h += '
'; h += '
' + esc(typeObj.label) + '
'; if (dmg.location) h += '
📍 ' + esc(dmg.location) + '
'; if (dmg.notes) h += '
' + esc(dmg.notes) + '
'; if (dmg.aiDesc) h += '
✦ ' + esc(dmg.aiDesc) + '
'; h += '
'; if (!done) h += ''; h += '
'; // Photos if (dmg.photos && dmg.photos.length) { h += '
'; dmg.photos.forEach(function(p){ h += ''; }); h += '
'; } h += '

'; h += '
🏠

No damage recorded yet

'; el('dv-walkaround-body').innerHTML = h; } // Add damage modal — rendered inline as a slide-up panel function dvWaOpenAddDamage(jobId) { var panel = el('dv-wa-panel'); if (!panel) return; _waJobId = jobId; var h = '
'; h += '
'; h += '
Add Property Damage

Damage Type

'; panel.innerHTML = h; panel.style.display = 'block'; panel.style.position = 'fixed'; panel.style.bottom = '0'; panel.style.left = '0'; panel.style.right = '0'; panel.style.zIndex = '999'; panel.style.background = 'rgba(0,0,0,.4)'; panel.style.top = '0'; panel.style.display = 'flex'; panel.style.alignItems = 'flex-end'; window._waSelectedType = null; window._waPhotoB64 = null; window._waAiDesc = null; } function dvWaSelectType(typeId) { window._waSelectedType = typeId; DV_WALKAROUND_TYPES.forEach(function(t) { var el2 = el('wa-type-' + t.id); if (!el2) return; var active = t.id === typeId; el2.style.borderColor = active ? t.col : '#E3E7F0'; el2.style.background = active ? (t.col + '22') : 'transparent'; }); } function dvWaPhotoSelected(input) { var file = input.files && input.files[0]; if (!file) return; var reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { window._waPhotoB64 = e.target.result; var prev = el('wa-photo-preview'); if (prev) { prev.innerHTML = '
✦ Analysing damage with AI…
'; } dvWaRunAi(e.target.result); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function dvWaRunAi(b64) { var apiKey = APP_SETTINGS && APP_SETTINGS.claudeApiKey; var imgData = b64.split(',')[1]; var mediaType = b64.startsWith('data:image/png') ? 'image/png' : 'image/jpeg'; var prompt = 'You are a property damage assessment assistant for a removals company. Look at this photo and in 1-2 short sentences describe: (1) what type of property surface or feature is damaged, (2) the nature and approximate severity of the damage. Be factual and concise. Format: "[Surface]: [damage description]". Example: "Hallway wall: shallow scratch approx 30cm long, paint surface only".'; var body = JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 120, messages: [{role:'user', content:[{type:'image',source:{type:'base64',media_type:mediaType,data:imgData}},{type:'text',text:prompt}]}] }); var headers = {'Content-Type':'application/json'}; var url = '/api/claude'; if (apiKey) { url = 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages'; headers['x-api-key'] = apiKey; headers['anthropic-version'] = '2023-06-01'; headers['anthropic-dangerous-allow-browser'] = 'true'; } fetch(url, {method:'POST', headers:headers, credentials:apiKey?undefined:'include', body:body}) .then(function(r){return r.json();}) .then(function(data){ var blocks = data.content || (data.result && data.result.content) || []; var txt = blocks.filter(function(b){return b.type==='text';}).map(function(b){return b.text;}).join(''); window._waAiDesc = txt.trim(); var statusEl = el('wa-ai-status'); if (statusEl) statusEl.innerHTML = '✦ AI: ' + esc(window._waAiDesc) + ''; // Auto-fill notes if empty var notesEl = el('wa-notes'); if (notesEl && !notesEl.value) notesEl.value = window._waAiDesc; }) .catch(function(){ var statusEl = el('wa-ai-status'); if (statusEl) statusEl.innerHTML = 'AI unavailable — enter notes manually'; }); } function dvWaSaveDamage(jobId) { var j = jobs.filter(function(x){return x.id===jobId;})[0]; if (!j) return; var type = window._waSelectedType; var location = (el('wa-location')||{}).value || ''; var notes = (el('wa-notes')||{}).value || ''; if (!type) { toast('Select a damage type'); return; } if (!location && !notes) { toast('Add a location or description'); return; } if (!j.crewData) j.crewData = {}; if (!j.crewData.walkaround) j.crewData.walkaround = {damages:[]}; j.crewData.walkaround.damages.push({ type: type, location: location, notes: notes, aiDesc: window._waAiDesc || null, photos: window._waPhotoB64 ? [window._waPhotoB64] : [], recordedAt: new Date().toISOString(), recordedBy: window._driverName || 'Crew' }); saveData('job', j.id, j); dvWaClosePanel(); dvRenderWalkaround(jobId); toast('✓ Damage recorded'); } function dvWaClosePanel() { var panel = el('dv-wa-panel'); if (panel) { panel.style.display = 'none'; panel.innerHTML = ''; } window._waSelectedType = null; window._waPhotoB64 = null; window._waAiDesc = null; } function dvWaDeleteDamage(jobId, idx) { var j = jobs.filter(function(x){return x.id===jobId;})[0]; if (!j || !j.crewData || !j.crewData.walkaround) return; j.crewData.walkaround.damages.splice(idx, 1); saveData('job', j.id, j); dvRenderWalkaround(jobId); } function dvWaComplete(jobId) { var j = jobs.filter(function(x){return x.id===jobId;})[0]; if (!j) return; if (!j.crewData.walkaround) j.crewData.walkaround = {damages:[]}; j.crewData.walkaround.completedAt = new Date().toISOString(); j.crewData.walkaround.completedBy = window._driverName || 'Crew'; saveData('job', j.id, j); toast('✓ Property walkaround complete'); dvShowScreen('dv-screen-job'); dvRenderJobDetail(jobId); } >
